source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements for the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements for the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone Development within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements for the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone Development within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone
provisions.text: Within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD), as shown on Schedule 22, development is regulated by the HCD-SV zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements for the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone Development within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 342(3) and 342(4), within the HCD-SV zone, development shall be subject to the requirements of this Chapter.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements for the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone Development within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone
provisions.text: A development within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD), as shown on Schedule 22, is further regulated under the H-700 Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District By- law, and those regulations apply in addition to the requirements of this Chapter.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements for the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone Development within the Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District (SHCD) / HCD-SV Zone
provisions.text: A development complying with this Chapter may be prohibited or further restricted under other legislation, including H-700 Schmidtville Heritage Conservation District By-law. Number of Main Buildings on a Lot

sections.title_label_raw: Any development shall comply with the following requirements:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any development shall comply with the following requirements:
provisions.text: Any development shall comply with the following requirements:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any development shall comply with the following requirements:
provisions.text: Every main building shall be located on a lot;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any development shall comply with the following requirements:
provisions.text: A main building shall not be located on more than one lot; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any development shall comply with the following requirements:
provisions.text: A maximum of one main building is permitted on a lot. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 344(3), a rear addition to a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as identified on Schedule 23, shall not exceed:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345,
provisions.text: a height of 6.1 metres for any main building that is located in an 11-metre height precinct, as shown on Schedule 15; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345,
provisions.text: the height of the existing main building, if that building is located in an 8- metre height precinct, as shown on Schedule 15.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 344(2) and 344(3), and Section 345,
provisions.text: A Schmidtville Heritage Building, as identified on Schedule 23, may exceed the maximum building height specified in Subsections 344(1) and 344(2) by no more than 0.7 metre, if it is raised at its foundation. Height Exemptions for Building Rooftop Features

sections.title_label_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no more than 3.0 metres above the main building rooftop on which they are located:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: chimneys and stovepipes;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: antennas;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: flag poles;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: lightning rods;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: solar collectors; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: vents.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following building rooftop features may protrude by no
provisions.text: Features listed in Subsection 345(1) may exceed a height above the maximum required height contained in Section 344, as long as the feature is no higher than 3.0 metres above the roof. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Any main building shall have a minimum required front or flanking

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building shall have a minimum required front or flanking
provisions.text: Any main building shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 347(2) and 347(3), the minimum

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 347(2) and 347(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 347(2) and 347(3), the minimum required side setback for any main building shall be 1.0 metre.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 347(2) and 347(3), the minimum
provisions.text: The minimum side setback required under Subsection 347(1) shall be reduced to 0.0 metre where a common wall is shared.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 347(2) and 347(3), the minimum
provisions.text: No development is permitted within any existing side yard of a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23. Rear Setback Requirements

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 348(2), 348(3), 348(4), and 348(5), the
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 348(2), 348(3), 348(4), and 348(5), the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 9.1 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 348(2), 348(3), 348(4), and 348(5), the
provisions.text: For any Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, that is located within an 8.0-metre height precinct, as shown on Schedule 15, the minimum required rear setback shall be 6.1 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 348(2), 348(3), 348(4), and 348(5), the
provisions.text: For any new lot created after November 3, 2018 and that is located within the Wright Avenue (WA) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F, the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 1.22 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 348(2), 348(3), 348(4), and 348(5), the
provisions.text: Within a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, which contains a restaurant use or a local commercial use, the minimum required rear setback shall be 1.22 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 348(2), 348(3), 348(4), and 348(5), the
provisions.text: Within the Morris Queen (MQ) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F, the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 1.22 metres. Maximum Building Dimensions for Schmidtville Heritage Buildings

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, shall not result in:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: a main building that exceeds a building depth of 18.3 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: the addition exceeding a maximum width of 67% of the width of the existing main building.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: A rear addition to a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, to allow 5 to 10 dwelling units, a restaurant use, or a local commercial use, shall not result in:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: the entire main building exceeding a building depth of 24.4 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: the rear addition exceeding a maximum width of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: 67% of the width of the existing main building for the first 3.0 metres in depth from a rear wall that existed on November 3, 2018, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 349(2), a rear addition to a Schmidtville
provisions.text: 100% of the width of the existing main building for any portion of an addition that is located beyond 3.0 metres in depth from a rear wall that existed on November 3, 2018, as shown on Schedule 24. Maximum Building Dimensions for Buildings that are Not Schmidtville Heritage Buildings

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 350(2), any main building that is not

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 350(2), any main building that is not
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 350(2), any main building that is not identified as a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, shall have a maximum required building depth of 9.1 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 350(2), any main building that is not
provisions.text: On a lot that does not contain a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, and has a maximum building height precinct of 8.0 metres, as shown on Schedule 15, the building depth shall not exceed 13.8 metres. Accessory Structures

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: Accessory structures shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: be limited to one per lot;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: be permitted in a rear yard only;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: be set back from any side lot line:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: on a lot containing a Schmidtville Heritage Building, as shown on Schedule 23, equal to or greater than the distance of any main building to the side lot line, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: on a lot containing a building that is not a Schmidtville Heritage Building, 1.25 metres to the side lot line;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: not have a minimum required rear setback;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: be separated from any other structure on the same lot by no less than 1.25 metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: not exceed a footprint of 14.0 square metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall:
provisions.text: not exceed a height of 4.3 metres. Design Requirements
